text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ngh! Did I not go beyond the limit?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Is it because I have been asking the wrong
questions in my previous studies?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This only means more research is necessary.
Heh-heh, not that I could grow tired of that
anyway!
choice_data_list: Looks like you still gained something from this.
Looks like you still gained something from this.
Let's aim for better results next time.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This only means more research is necessary.
Heh-heh, not that I could grow tired of that
anyway!
choice_data_list: Looks like you still gained something from this.
Looks like you still gained something from this.
Let's aim for better results next time.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Trainer. Let's put together what we have so
far, shall we?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, I'm getting the urge to do some research!
Follow me, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: All right, you know what this means.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
We must keep up our pursuit of new potential.
There's no giving up.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Come on! Let's hurry back and continue our
research. For the bright future of all
Umamusume-kind!
